summary.shape_sentence: Bullish drive off the open, midday consolidation, afternoon continuation to new highs, then late selloff into a higher close.

goat.note: Clean opening expansion from the RTH low area into the first major upside level near 28095.

red_circles.behavior: No clearly visible red-circle labels on the frame; bearish behavior concentrated at the late rejection from 28180-28190 supply.

green_circles.behavior: No clearly visible green-circle labels on the frame; bullish pivot behavior appeared at the open low, 10:18 pullback, 12:28 flush, and 13:18 reclaim.

orange_banks_supply.behavior: No visible orange bank icons; functional supply near 28180-28190 was respected into the close.

blue_banks_demand.behavior: No visible blue bank icons; functional demand held near 27965-27980, 28045, and 28095.

time_markers.10am_blue: Price was already extended from the open, holding the first upside drive around 28085-28105.
time_markers.12pm_red: Market was in a sideways-to-higher lunch range near 28135-28145 before the 12:30 flush.
time_markers.2pm_green: Afternoon continuation was active, pressing toward the high zone around 28165-28180.
time_markers.4pm_yellow: Closed after a late pullback, above the open but below the afternoon highs.

takeaway: Bullish RTH trend day with the best opportunity in the opening drive, followed by lunch compression, afternoon continuation, and a late rejection from supply.
